Cut lemons in half, then place on heated grill with cut side down until charred and aromatic.  Squeeze and reserve juice.
In a vitamix blender, combine all ingredients except the xantham gum, and blend on high
Once smooth, add xantham slowly while blending on high to ensure even distribution
Check for consistency and taste, then reserve to quart containers.
Store in the cooler.
